        The protocol-truth reference for the Hyperliquid L1 reimplementation. Every claim here is tagged with its evidence level.

\textbf{Evidence levels}: \nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} = verified from binary RE or official docs. \nolinkurl{OBSERVED} = seen in runtime/snapshots. \nolinkurl{IMPLEMENTED} = coded in hlx. \nolinkurl{INFERRED} = deduced from behavior.

Use the White Paper for narrative architecture. Use the Hypurrliquid Paper for the full RE reference with Mermaid diagrams. Use the Action Inventory for the current action-family and sub-variant tables. Use the Truth Register when you want the compact fact ledger instead of the full chapter narrative. For the denser subsystem splits, use Hashing, Staking \& Validators, Bridge2, and Outcomes.

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{0. Truth Surfaces}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{0. Truth Surfaces}

This paper is the technical narrative, not the only truth surface. Read it together with:

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item Truth Register for the compact confirmed/active fact ledger
\item Open Claims for unresolved work
\item Protocol Scope Matrix for \nolinkurl{protocol} vs \nolinkurl{testnet_impl} vs \nolinkurl{local_impl}
\item Action Inventory for action-family and sub-variant tables
            \end{itemize}

\section*{1. Block Lifecycle (46 Hook Points)}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{1. Block Lifecycle (46 Hook Points)}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} from binary VA 0x01e748e0 and string at 0x539f8a.

\subsection*{1.1 Pipeline}
\addcontentsline{toc}{subsection}{1.1 Pipeline}

\begin{Verbatim}[fontsize=\small]
            RecoverUsers -> BeginBlock (9+5 effects) -> DeliverSignedActions (97 types)
-> ProcessFills -> EVM Block -> EndBlock -> Commit -> VoteAppHash
            \end{Verbatim}

Current local \nolinkurl{main} matches the widened 9-effect note on this ordering. What remains open on ActionDelayer is control semantics (\nolinkurl{enabled}, \nolinkurl{delayer_mode}, \nolinkurl{status_guard}, \nolinkurl{vty_trackers}), not the named drain slot.

\subsection*{1.4 EndBlock}
\addcontentsline{toc}{subsection}{1.4 EndBlock}

Mark prices updated from book mid-prices: \nolinkurl{mark_prices[asset] = book.mid_price()}.

\subsection*{1.5 VoteAppHash}
\addcontentsline{toc}{subsection}{1.5 VoteAppHash}

Every 2000 blocks. Quorum at 2/3+ stake. Final \nolinkurl{app_hash} is \nolinkurl{first_16(SHA-256(L1_combined)) || first_16(SHA-256(EVM_combined))}, where each half comes from the \nolinkurl{rmp_serde -> blake3 XOF (2048B) -> paddw u16} LtHash pipeline rather than one flat 14-category digest.

\subsection*{1.6 Consensus / Topology Surface}
\addcontentsline{toc}{subsection}{1.6 Consensus / Topology Surface}

Current confirmed testnet-facing networking and consensus facts:

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item ingress is concentrated through a broadcaster layer
\item proposer rotation uses stake-weighted \nolinkurl{RoundRobinTtl}
\item QC and TC certificates drive the two-chain commit rule
\item validator/sentry admission checks gate the transport layer
\item ports \nolinkurl{4001} and \nolinkurl{4002} split block-streaming and peer/RPC verification traffic
            \end{itemize}

Treat the exact operator deployment shape as still chain-scoped, but keep these surfaces aligned across lifecycle, gossip, and consensus notes.

\subsection*{1.7 Validator Lifecycle / Jail Surface}
\addcontentsline{toc}{subsection}{1.7 Validator Lifecycle / Jail Surface}

Current confirmed validator-control facts:

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item epochs are time-based via \nolinkurl{epoch_duration_seconds}
\item active validators are recomputed at epoch boundaries
\item signer admission checks search \nolinkurl{epoch_states[cur_epoch]}
\item jailed signers are excluded from normal proposer / signing flow
\item \nolinkurl{CSignerAction} currently has \nolinkurl{unjailSelf}, \nolinkurl{jailSelf}, and \nolinkurl{jailSelfIsolated}
\item manual unjail is rate-limited by \nolinkurl{signer_to_last_manual_unjail_time}
            \end{itemize}

What remains open on this lane is threshold/trigger detail, not the existence of the lifecycle surface.

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{3. Action Surface (97 Variants, 126 Sub-Types)}

Current testnet notes widen the action surface to 97 variants. The local engine has broad typed coverage, but parity work remains active and this page should not be read as a blanket ``zero gaps'' claim.

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{4. Funding Rate}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{4. Funding Rate}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} from binary assertions.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{EMA}: DeterministicEma with fraction-based accumulation (num/denom). \nolinkurl{assert!(decay <= 1.)}, \nolinkurl{assert!(self.denom > 0.)}.
\item \textbf{Funding payment}: \nolinkurl{payment = szi x oracle_px x (cum_funding_global - pos.cum_funding_entry)}
\item \textbf{Direction}: Positive rate = longs pay shorts.
\item \textbf{Guard interval}: 8000ms for both distribute and update.
\item \textbf{Per-asset multiplier}: Set via \nolinkurl{SetFundingMultiplier} VoteGlobal.
            \end{itemize}

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{5. Liquidation \& ADL}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{5. Liquidation \& ADL}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} from binary constants and docs.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{Margin check}: \nolinkurl{margin_available = account_value - initial_margin_required}. Liquidatable when \textless{} 0.
\item \textbf{Isolated}: Per-position check with allocated margin.
\item \textbf{BOLE liquidation threshold}: Health factor \textless{} 0.8.
\item \textbf{BOLE cooldown}: 30 seconds for partial liquidations.
\item \textbf{BOLE types}: Partial (50\% seize), Market (full repay), Backstop (default liquidator).
\item \textbf{ADL}: Triggered when shortfall persists after liquidation. Counterparties ranked by ROE (highest first). Position reduced proportionally.
\item \textbf{ADL priority}: \nolinkurl{ROE = unrealized_pnl / margin_allocated}.
            \end{itemize}

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{6. State Hashing}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{6. State Hashing}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} algorithm: \nolinkurl{rmp_serde -> blake3 XOF (2048B) -> paddw u16 (LtHash16) -> SHA-256 (32B)}.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{11 L1 categories} + \textbf{3 EVM categories} = 14 accumulators.
\item \textbf{L1 accumulators}: Running sums from genesis maintained in live state, not the stale BSS cache that earlier notes treated as canonical.
\item \textbf{EVM accumulators}: accounts\_hash, contracts\_hash, storage\_hash.
\item \textbf{Heartbeat \nolinkurl{concise_lt_hashes}}: EVM only. The traced heartbeat surface does not carry the full L1 accumulator state.
            \end{itemize}

\subsection*{6.1 AppHash Split}
\addcontentsline{toc}{subsection}{6.1 AppHash Split}

Current repo truth is that the final \nolinkurl{app_hash} is \nolinkurl{first_16(SHA-256(L1_combined)) || first_16(SHA-256(EVM_combined))}, not a single SHA-256 over one merged 14-accumulator buffer.

\subsection*{6.2 RespHash Backend Split}
\addcontentsline{toc}{subsection}{6.2 RespHash Backend Split}

Current repo truth is intentionally narrower than "hashing is solved":

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item the code explicitly tracks \nolinkurl{Mainnet} versus \nolinkurl{Testnet} RespHash backends
\item the backend split is real and should remain chain-scoped in docs and replay work
\item the local implementation does \textbf{not} yet claim full mainnet serializer parity across all response families
            \end{itemize}

Treat \nolinkurl{RespHashMode::Mainnet} as backend selection, not as proof that every mainnet response serializer is already closed.

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{7. CoreWriter (EVM $\rightarrow$ L1)}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{7. CoreWriter (EVM $\rightarrow$ L1)}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} from binary and official docs.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{Precompile address}: \nolinkurl{0x3333333333333333333333333333333333333333}
\item \textbf{Function}: \nolinkurl{sendRawAction(bytes)} selector \nolinkurl{0x17938e13}
\item \textbf{Encoding}: \nolinkurl{abi.encodePacked(uint8(1), uint24(actionId), abi.encode(params...))}
\item \textbf{15 action types}: LimitOrder, VaultTransfer, TokenDelegate, StakingDeposit, StakingWithdraw, SpotSend, UsdClassTransfer, FinalizeEvmContract, AddApiWallet, CancelByOid, CancelByCloid, ApproveBuilderFee, SendAsset, ReflectEvmSupplyChange, BorrowLend.
\item \textbf{Delay}: \nolinkurl{delay_scale x 3000ms} (configurable). Actions fire in next block's begin\_block Effect 8.
\item \textbf{In replay mode}: Raw tx calldata scanned via RLP parser without EVM execution.
            \end{itemize}

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{8. Bridge Finalization and Validator-Set Updates}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{8. Bridge Finalization and Validator-Set Updates}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} from Bridge2 state naming, bridge action inventory, and the current control-plane notes.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{Bridge2 state} includes \nolinkurl{withdrawal_signatures}, \nolinkurl{withdrawal_finalized_votes}, \nolinkurl{finished_withdrawal_to_time}, \nolinkurl{validator_set_signatures}, \nolinkurl{validator_set_finalized_votes}, \nolinkurl{bal}, \nolinkurl{last_pruned_deposit_block_number}, and \nolinkurl{oaw} (\nolinkurl{bool}).
\item \textbf{Withdrawal entrypoint}: \nolinkurl{withdraw3}.
\item \textbf{Bridge signing action}: \nolinkurl{ValidatorSignWithdrawal}.
\item \textbf{Finalize actions}: \nolinkurl{VoteEthFinalizedWithdrawal} and \nolinkurl{VoteEthFinalizedValidatorSetUpdate}.
\item \textbf{Validator-set update signing}: \nolinkurl{SignValidatorSetUpdate}.
\item \textbf{Signer model}: current repo truth keeps bridge signing on validator signer keys, not an unrelated bridge-only signer family.
            \end{itemize}

What remains open is exact dispute-period closure and some Ethereum-side operational details, not whether bridge finalization is a first-class staged state machine.

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{9. Aligned Quote Token (HPT)}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{9. Aligned Quote Token (HPT)}

\nolinkurl{DISCOVERED} from Hyperliquid docs + API.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{Exchange field [56]}\nolinkurl{hpt} = AlignedQuoteTokenTracker.
\item \textbf{Per-token state}: isAligned, firstAlignedTime, evmMintedSupply, dailyAmountOwed, predictedRate.
\item \textbf{Validator sidecar}: \nolinkurl{aqa-publisher} (\href{https://github.com/native-markets/aqa-publisher}{github.com/native-markets/aqa-publisher}).
\item \textbf{Rate source}: 30-day SOFR average from NY Fed, FRED, OFR (median of 3 sources).
\item \textbf{Submission}: \nolinkurl{validatorL1Stream} action with \nolinkurl{riskFreeRate} field, daily at 22:00 UTC.
\item \textbf{Protocol rate}: Stake-weighted median of all active validator votes.
\item \textbf{Fee benefits}: 20\% lower taker, 50\% better maker rebate for aligned stablecoins.
            \end{itemize}

This is also a begin-block surface: \nolinkurl{update_aligned_quote_token} is the current effect-9 lane in the widened testnet note.

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{10. Outcomes and Settlement Surface}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{10. Outcomes and Settlement Surface}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} for the baseline market model; \nolinkurl{HYPOTHESIS} for the leading solvency-risk lane.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{Risk mode}: 1x isolated-only, no leverage, no funding.
\item \textbf{Settlement authority}: \nolinkurl{oracleUpdater} posts final outcome via \nolinkurl{SettleOutcome}.
\item \textbf{Post-settlement behavior}: open orders auto-cancel via \nolinkurl{outcomeSettledCanceled}; new orders reject via \nolinkurl{outcomeSettledRejected}.
\item \textbf{Question metadata}: \nolinkurl{fallbackOutcome}, \nolinkurl{namedOutcomes}, \nolinkurl{settledNamedOutcomes}.
\item \textbf{User token operations}: \nolinkurl{SplitOutcome}, \nolinkurl{MergeOutcome}, \nolinkurl{MergeQuestion}, \nolinkurl{NegateOutcome}.
            \end{itemize}

Current open risk lane:

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \nolinkurl{MergeQuestion} / fallback reconciliation is still the leading higher-order solvency hypothesis.
\item The repo should treat question-level accounting as riskier than the simpler YES/NO pair mechanics until the binary path is closed.
            \end{itemize}

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{11. Gossip Protocol}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{11. Gossip Protocol}

\nolinkurl{CONFIRMED} from binary RE.

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.4em]
            \item \textbf{Frame format}: \nolinkurl{[u32 BE len][u8 kind][body]}. Traced data frames often use LZ4 with \nolinkurl{kind=0x01}, while greetings use \nolinkurl{kind=0x00}.
\item \textbf{Port 4001 greeting}: bincode-fork \nolinkurl{TcpGreeting} with chain-based variant index. Current live observations are testnet variant \nolinkurl{3} (8 bytes total) and mainnet variant \nolinkurl{2} (7 bytes total).
\item \textbf{Broader chain enum}: the ABCI-stream chain mapping still tracks \nolinkurl{Local=0}, \nolinkurl{Sandbox=1}, \nolinkurl{Testnet=2}, \nolinkurl{Mainnet=3}; do not conflate that with the observed 4001 \nolinkurl{TcpGreeting} variant index.
\item \textbf{Port 4003 authenticated greeting}: \nolinkurl{keccak256("Hyperliquid Consensus Payload" + 0x00 + bincode(content))}; content is bincode, not msgpack.
\item \textbf{Connection}: Server-side \nolinkurl{connection_checks} --- unknown peers rejected after 5s timeout.
\item \textbf{Loopback}: Dominated by \nolinkurl{MsgConcise}/\nolinkurl{OutMsgConcise} (tag 27/28).
            \end{itemize}

\medskip\hrule\medskip

\section*{12. Guard System}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{12. Guard System}

All rate-limited effects use \nolinkurl{BucketGuard}:

\begin{Verbatim}[fontsize=\small]
            struct BucketGuard {
    last_time: Option<u64>,   // ms
    interval_ms: u64,
}
            \end{Verbatim}

\begingroup
        \small
        \setlength{\tabcolsep}{4pt}
        \renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.16}
        \begin{longtable}{L{0.35\linewidth}L{0.16\linewidth}L{0.35\linewidth}}
        \toprule
        Guard & Interval & Effect \\
        \midrule
        \endfirsthead
        \toprule
        Guard & Interval & Effect \\
        \midrule
        \endhead
        \nolinkurl{funding_distribute_guard} & 8000ms & Funding settlement \\
\nolinkurl{funding_update_guard} & 8000ms & Premium sampling \\
\nolinkurl{cancel_oi_cap_guard} & 1000ms & OI cap order cancellation \\
\nolinkurl{book_empty_user_states_pruning_guard} & 60000ms & Book cleanup \\
\nolinkurl{reset_recent_oi_guard} & 1000ms & HIP-3 OI reset \\
\nolinkurl{hip3_stale_mark_px_guard} & From snapshot & Stale mark refresh \\
\nolinkurl{begin_block_logic_guard} & 1000ms & Reentrancy protection \\
\nolinkurl{funding_err_dur_guard} & 60000ms & Funding error duration \\
        \bottomrule
        \end{longtable}
        \endgroup
